ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last modified */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to the documentation of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Source link of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "omae" REAL /* Overall Mean Absolute Error (OMAE) of the model */,
  "cohen_kappa_rate" REAL /* Cohen's Kappa rate of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) of the model */,
  "geometric_mean" REAL /* Geometric mean of the model */,
  "num_rules" INTEGER /* Number of rules in the model */,
  "num_conditions" INTEGER /* Number of conditions in the model */,
  "avg_conditions" REAL /* Average number of conditions per rule */,
  "num_evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations performed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the experiment in seconds */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model evaluator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the change or modification */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or updates */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or updates */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)
